modules.gui.utils package#

Submodules#

modules.gui.utils.utils module#

class BasicProgbar(text: str, maximum=100)[source]#

Bases: object

close()[source]#

Force finish the progbar.

setValue(n)[source]#

Update the progress indicator.

Params:

p (float): the percentage of progress made

wasCanceled()[source]#

Dummy function – do nothing!

addItem(widget: QWidget, container, item)[source]#

Add an item to an existing menu or menubar

Params:

widget (QWidget): the widget to contain the attributes container: the menu or menubar item: the item to add

drawOutlinedText(painter: QPainter, x: int, y: int, text: str, c1: tuple, c2: tuple, size: int, right_justify=False)[source]#

Draw outlined text using a QPainter object.

Params:

painter (QPainter): the QPainter object to use x (int): the x-pos of the text y (int): the y-pos of the text text (str): the text to write to the screen c1 (tuple): the primary color of the text c2 (tuple): the outline color of the text size (int): the size of the text

getProgbar(text, cancel=True, maximum=100)[source]#

Create a progress bar (either for pyqt or in cmd text).

Params:

text (str): the text for the progress bar cancel (bool): True if progress bar is cancelable maximum (int): the max value for the progress bar

newAction(widget: QWidget, container: QMenu, action_tuple: tuple)[source]#

Create an action within a menu.

Params:

widget (QWidget): the widget the action is connected to container (QMenu): the menu that contains the action action_tuple (tuple): the tuple describing the action (name, text, keyboard shortcut, function)

newMenu(widget: QWidget, container, menu_dict: dict)[source]#

Create a menu.

Params:

widget (QWidget): the widget the menu is connected to container (QMenu or QMenuBar): the menu containing the new menu menu_dict (dict): the dictionary describing the menu

newQAction(widget: QWidget, container: QMenu, action: QAction)[source]#

Add an existing action to the menu.

Params:

widget (QWidget): the widget the action is connected to container (QMenu): the menu that contains the action action (QAction): the action to add to the menu

noUndoWarning()[source]#

Inform the user of an action that can’t be undone.

notify(message)[source]#

Notify the user.

notifyConfirm(message)[source]#

Notify the user and give option to OK or cancel.

populateMenu(widget: QWidget, menu: QMenu, menu_list: list)[source]#

Create a menu.

Params:

widget (QWidget): the widget the menu belongs to menu (QMenu): the menu object to contain the list objects menu_list (list): formatted list describing the menu

populateMenuBar(widget: QWidget, menu: QMenuBar, menubar_list: list)[source]#

Create a menubar for a widget.

Params:

widget (QWidget): the widget containing the menu bar menubar (QMenuBar): the menubar object to add menus to menubar_list (list): the list of menus on the menubar

saveNotify()[source]#
setMainWindow(mw)[source]#

Set the main window for the gui functions.

unsavedNotify()[source]#
